title: OCI Log Group Deleted
description: Detects deletion of OCI Log Analytics log groups. Deleting log groups destroys collected log data and can indicate an attacker covering their tracks.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.loganalytics.deleteloganalyticsloggroup' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.logging.deleteloggroup')))
falsepositives: Log group consolidation during infrastructure cleanup
